name: ia
description: IBM i Impact Analysis for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: RPG/CL dependency tracing, field impact, call hierarchy, spec generation.
interface.longDescription: Use iA to navigate IBM i applications the way a seasoned RPG developer does. Trace where-used, build call graphs, classify field-change impact, generate audience-tuned program specs.
defaultPrompt: Trace the impact of changing field CUSTNO in CUSTMAST.
Document program ORDENTRY for senior developers.
Show me the call tree for BILLPROC.
